titles.title: Bai Jia Jue: Jianghu Gui Shi Lu
Bai Jia Jue: The Strange Stories of Jianghu

data.title: Bai Jia Jue: Jianghu Gui Shi Lu
title_synonyms: Bai Jia Jue: The Strange Stories of Jianghu
data.synopsis:
In the future city, science and robots have become necessities in people's lives. The research, development and use of technology maintain a delicate balance between the scientific ethics committee, the technology chaebol, and the third-party security system company Mosh. Wang Xiaoyun, the only son of the Wang Group, was assassinated by an illegal robot while he was out hunting. Everyone in his entourage was spared. The balance of power has been broken, and the undercurrent is surging. 

Bai Wuxie, captain of the 24th Operation Team in charge of public security, found Zhang Bingyi and Shang Weiyang, consultants who are good at mechanical networks, to assist in the investigation. After several on-site investigations, it was discovered that the murderer turned out to be a product of the "robot oligarchy" Aibozer Company. 

At the same time, Mosh also encountered a security crisis, and everything seemed to be driven by someone behind the scenes. Zhang Bingyi, Bai Wuxie and Mo Shangshuang from Mosh Company were forced to form a special operations team to find out the truth behind the scenes.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

titles.title: アイドルマスター シャイニーカラーズ 2nd season

data.title: The iDOLM@STER Shiny Colors 2nd Season
data.title_japanese: アイドルマスター シャイニーカラーズ 2nd season
data.synopsis:
Following the success of Shiny Colors' first concert, Mano Sakuragi and her friends continue to face new challenges. After Straylight, a new unit of 283 Production, makes its debut concert, the members of the units are temporarily shuffled into new groups to prepare for a Halloween event to help them grow individually as idols.

While Mano struggles to express her ideas, her fellow unit member Hiori Kazano feels left out by her new comrades' talent. At the same time, Fuyuko Mayuzumi, who has bitterly failed to become Straylight's center, proves completely unable to show her real personality, jeopardizing the entire project in the process. Shiny Colors' producer will have to find a way for Fuyuko to break out of her shell if he wants to see his idol units illuminate the world once more.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: ハコフグとみなまたの海
The Boxfish and the Minamata Sea

data.title: Hakofugu to Minamata no Umi
data.title_english: The Boxfish and the Minamata Sea
data.title_japanese: ハコフグとみなまたの海
data.synopsis:
Based on a picture book titled Hakofugu no Negai (The Wish of the Boxfish) by Sakana-kun, the story is about the main character, Hakofugu, who is unsure of himself, who meets Himetatsu, a lost child, and together they begin their adventure to the "Sea of Minamata".

(Source: Patreon)

data.title: Pop Pop City
data.synopsis:
The night of a family birthday party. The mother is tired from work and wants to drink a beer as soon as possible. The father is fidgety and keeps an eye on the clock. A little girl is excited about the sumptuous meal and runs around the house. The intercom rings. There, a "new family member" is standing there...

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Bridge: My Little Friends
data.synopsis:
"I'll let you meet Shiro. I promise!" Jin the cat promised Mugi, who was grieving over the loss of his beloved dog Shiro. Jin loves Mugi very much, and after hearing the story of the Rainbow Bridge from his owner Kageyama, he decided to let Mugi meet Shiro at the end of the rainbow! Will Jin be able to save Mugi from her sadness? He invites the pigeons and squirrels from the neighborhood, and now Jin's big plan begins!

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Kicks and Punk
data.synopsis:
"Let's go. In search of treasure"
Nike, a punky outsider girl, runs through the city of the future! In a city where the transportation infrastructure has developed dramatically and walking is no longer necessary, Nike runs alone in her favorite sneakers. Her goal is to get sneakers from the legendary manufacturer "Dynameros", which can only be obtained on the black market. As Nike runs despite being chased by a horde of cyber police, a woman appears in front of her. That woman is none other than Sherry, the daughter of the president of "Fractal Walter", a major company that created the era. What kind of story will the encounter between these two opposing people produce?

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Ephemere
data.synopsis:
Uta, who works and lives in a hotel on Uranus, has always thought that she is different from other people. Whenever she has free time, she sits in front of her computer making things she likes and enjoys herself alone, or goes to cafes alone. One day, she receives a "Future Ticket" - the key to a new life. Despite this, Uta continues to live her life as she always has. However, as the "Star Festival", a festival to commemorate the closest point between Uranus and Neptune, approaches, she meets Paula, a popular influencer from Neptune whom she admires. After becoming close to her, Uta makes a major decision about her life.

(Source: Official site, translated)
